role: Integration seam registry for the Studio, declaring wired backend contracts and typed pending seams with a fail-loud guard.
capabilities: Catalog wired studio-backend seams (corpus, chatAtLocus, annotate, annotationsAt, addressHelp, upTranslate, act, intentAt, inFrameDeixis)
Catalog pending net-new seams (R2 context at address, I4 address tier, R1 persistent locus, L1 comment-to-intent)
Provide typed PendingSeam descriptors (id, what, why_pending, designed_test)
Expose a throwing callPendingSeam guard so unbound seams fail loudly
Document backend route/resolver mappings for each wired seam
substance_why: It defines concrete typed contracts for nine wired seams, four pending seams, and a throwing helper, with explicit backend route/resolver references.
interactions_missing: No UI region actually calls /api/context for R2_CONTEXT_AT_ADDRESS
No UI control resolves governance tier from address (I4_ADDRESS_TIER)
No UI/server path sets a persistent cross-call current locus (R1_PERSISTENT_LOCUS)
No auto-promotion of an annotation/comment into a build intent (L1_COMMENT_TO_INTENT)
Pending seams are only declared and guarded, not wired to real controls
reuse_why: The wired/pending seam taxonomy and fail-loud policy are core architecture, but entries must be promoted/demoted and typed descriptors refined as the redesign lands real bindings.
decomposition_hints: Split wired seam catalog from pending seam catalog and the throwing guard
Or split by domain: corpus/chat, annotation/context, act/intent, governance/deixis
